title: euodia glabra
intro: Euodia glabra, also known as Chinese peppercorn or prickly ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Euodia glabra include reducing fever, relieving pain and itching, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Euodia glabra can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a component of various formulas to promote digestion and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
